title: About U.S. Bank
note: Company overview source for U.S. Bancorp's banking, payments, wealth, and institutional service lines.

title: U.S. Bancorp 2025 Annual Report
note: Primary financial and business-segment source for profitability, operating scale, and regulatory context.

title: U.S. Bancorp (USB) Market Capitalization
note: Market capitalization snapshot used for the registry market-cap metric.

title: U.S. Bancorp PE Ratio 2012-2026
note: Public market valuation snapshot used for the P/E ratio metric.

title: About Elavon
note: Product source for Elavon's role as U.S. Bancorp's merchant acquiring and payment-processing brand.

title: U.S. Bank Expands Embedded Payments Suite to Power Efficient, Secure Transactions
note: Investor-relations source describing U.S. Bank embedded payment solutions and Elavon's role in merchant acquiring.

title: Merchant Services & Payment Processing Solutions
note: Product source for U.S. Bank merchant services and payment-processing offerings powered by Elavon.

title: Mojaloop
note: Primary project source for Mojaloop's open-source inclusive instant payment system positioning.

title: Introduction to Mojaloop
note: Technical documentation for Mojaloop's financial institution interconnection, participant management, and risk-control model.

title: Mojaloop Foundation Mission
note: Foundation source explaining Mojaloop's public-good and financial-inclusion mission.

title: GNU Taler
note: Primary source for GNU Taler's free-software, privacy-friendly electronic payment system.

title: Enabling Secure Web Payments with GNU Taler
note: Technical design source for GNU Taler's privacy and merchant-auditability model.

title: Fedimint
note: Primary source for Fedimint's open-source federated e-cash protocol for Bitcoin.

title: What is eCash?
note: Explains Fedimint-style e-cash, Bitcoin backing, blind signatures, and community custody tradeoffs.

title: Lightning
note: Documents how Fedimint e-cash can interoperate with Lightning through gateways.

title: Cyclos Payment Software
note: Source for Cyclos banking, payment, community currency, mobile banking, online banking, ecommerce, and POS capabilities.
